framework.name: Telecom Operational Security Requirements (PTSFS)
framework.name_nl: Foreskrifter om driftsakerhet for elektronisk kommunikation (PTSFS)
framework.scope: Security and operational requirements for electronic communications providers in Sweden under LEK (lagen om elektronisk kommunikation)
framework.structure_description: Organized by area: general requirements (PTS-1 to PTS-2), technical requirements (PTS-3 to PTS-5), incident reporting (PTS-6 to PTS-8), communication protection (PTS-9 to PTS-12), and operational security (PTS-13 to PTS-18).

controls.title: Operational security management system
controls.description: Providers of electronic communications shall establish and maintain a management system for operational security.
controls.description_nl: Leverantorer av elektronisk kommunikation ska uppractta och underhalla ett ledningssystem for driftsakerhet.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta ett ledningssystem for driftsakerhet baserat pa PTSFS. Integrera med befintligt informationssakerhetsarbete.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att ledningssystem for driftsakerhet ar implementerat.

controls.title: Risk assessment for communications networks
controls.description: Regular risk assessments shall be conducted for electronic communications networks and services.
controls.description_nl: Regelbundna riskbedomningar ska genomforas for elektroniska kommunikationsnat och tjanster.
controls.implementation_guidance: Genomfor riskbedomning av kommunikationsnat minst arligen. Beakta beroenden och redundans.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att riskbedomningar ar genomforda och aktuella.

controls.title: Network redundancy requirements
controls.description: Critical network components shall have redundancy to ensure continued operation during failures.
controls.description_nl: Kritiska natverkskomponenter ska ha redundans for att sakerstalla fortsatt drift vid fel.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera redundans i karnnatverket. Sakerstall alternativa vagar for kritisk trafik.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att redundans ar implementerad for kritiska komponenter.

controls.title: Power supply resilience for telecom equipment
controls.description: Telecommunications equipment at critical sites shall have backup power for at least 4 hours of autonomous operation.
controls.description_nl: Telekommunikationsutrustning pa kritiska platser ska ha reservkraft for minst 4 timmars autonom drift.
controls.implementation_guidance: Installera UPS och reservkraft vid kritiska natnoder. Sakerstall minst 4 timmars batteri-backup.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att reservkraft finns och testas regelbundet.

controls.title: Physical protection of network infrastructure
controls.description: Network infrastructure at critical sites shall be physically protected against unauthorized access and environmental threats.
controls.description_nl: Natverksinfrastruktur pa kritiska platser ska skyddas fysiskt mot obehorigad atkomst och miljohot.
controls.implementation_guidance: Installera passersystem, larmsystem och miljoovervakning vid kritiska natnoder.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att fysiskt skydd ar implementerat vid kritiska installationer.

controls.title: Incident reporting to PTS
controls.description: Significant security incidents or integrity breaches affecting electronic communications shall be reported to PTS.
controls.description_nl: Betydande sakerhetsincidenter eller integritetsincidenter som paverkar elektronisk kommunikation ska rapporteras till PTS.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta rutiner for incidentrapportering till PTS. Rapportera incidenter som paverkar mer an 1000 anvandare eller varar mer an 1 timme.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att rapporteringsrutiner finns och att relevanta incidenter har rapporterats.

controls.title: Incident classification for telecom
controls.description: Telecom incidents shall be classified by impact on number of affected users, duration, and geographical extent.
controls.description_nl: Telekomincidenter ska klassificeras efter paverkan pa antal berorda anvandare, varaktighet och geografisk utbredning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Tilllampa PTS klassificeringsmodell. Bedomning baserad pa berorda anvandare, tjanstens art och storningens varaktighet.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att incidentklassificering tilllampas och ar dokumenterad.

controls.title: Annual security report to PTS
controls.description: Providers shall submit an annual security report to PTS summarizing risk assessments, incidents, and security measures.
controls.description_nl: Leverantorer ska lamna en arlig sakerhetsrapport till PTS som sammanfattar riskbedomningar, incidenter och sakerhetsatgarder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta en arlig sakerhetsrapport enligt PTS mall. Inkludera incidentsammanstallning, riskbild och atgarder.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att arlig rapport har lamnats till PTS.

controls.title: Subscriber data protection
controls.description: Subscriber data shall be protected against unauthorized access, modification, and disclosure.
controls.description_nl: Abonnentuppgifter ska skyddas mot obehorigad atkomst, andring och rojarande.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera atkomstkontroller och kryptering for abonnentdatabaser. Logga all atkomst.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att skyddsatgarder for abonnentuppgifter ar implementerade.

controls.title: Signaling system security
controls.description: Signaling systems (SS7, Diameter, SIP) shall be protected against unauthorized manipulation and interception.
controls.description_nl: Signaleringssystem (SS7, Diameter, SIP) ska skyddas mot obehorigad manipulation och avlyssning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera signaleringsbrandvaggar. Begrantsa interconnect-trafik till kanda och betrodda parter.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att signaleringsskydd ar implementerat och konfigurerat.

controls.title: Emergency services availability (112)
controls.description: Electronic communications providers shall ensure uninterrupted access to emergency services via 112.
controls.description_nl: Leverantorer av elektronisk kommunikation ska sakerstalla oavbruten tillgang till nodnumret 112.
controls.implementation_guidance: Sakerstall redundanta vagar for 112-trafik. Testa tillgangligheten regelbundet.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att 112-tillganglighet ar sakerstalld och testad.

controls.title: Lawful interception capability
controls.description: Providers shall maintain lawful interception capabilities in accordance with Swedish law (LEK chapter 6).
controls.description_nl: Leverantorer ska underhalla formaga for hemlig avlyssning i enlighet med svensk lag (LEK kapitel 6).
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera och underhall hemlig avlyssningssystem enligt PTS specifikationer. Dokumentera handlaggerutiner.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att formaga for hemlig avlyssning finns och fungerar.

controls.title: Change management for network infrastructure
controls.description: Changes to network infrastructure shall follow documented change management procedures with risk assessment.
controls.description_nl: Andringar i natverksinfrastruktur ska folja dokumenterade andringshanteringsrutiner med riskbedomning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Tilllampa formaliserad andringshantering for alla natverksandringar. Genomfor riskbedomning fore andring.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att andringshantering tilllampas for natverksandringar.

controls.title: Network monitoring and surveillance
controls.description: Networks shall be monitored continuously for performance degradation, capacity issues, and security anomalies.
controls.description_nl: Natverk ska overvakas kontinuerligt for prestandaforsamring, kapacitetsproblem och sakerhetsavvikelser.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera NOC (Network Operations Center) med 24/7-overvakning for kritiska tjanster. Definiera larmtroskelvardar.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att natverksovervakning ar implementerad och att larm hanteras.

controls.title: Capacity planning for telecom services
controls.description: Capacity planning shall be performed to ensure networks can handle expected load and traffic growth.
controls.description_nl: Kapacitetsplanering ska genomforas for att sakerstalla att natverk kan hantera forvantad belastning och trafikokning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Genomfor kapacitetsplanering kvartalsvis. Prognostisera trafikokning och planera utbyggnad.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att kapacitetsplanering genomfors och att marginaler finns.

controls.title: Disaster recovery for telecom services
controls.description: Disaster recovery plans shall be established for critical telecom services with defined recovery time objectives.
controls.description_nl: Katastrofberedskapsplaner ska uppratttas for kritiska telekomtjanster med definierade aterstaallningstidsmal.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta katastrofberedskapsplaner med RTO och RPO for kritiska tjanster. Testa planer minst arligen.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att katastrofberedskapsplaner finns och har testats.

controls.title: Vulnerability management for telecom equipment
controls.description: Telecom equipment shall be maintained with current security patches and firmware updates.
controls.description_nl: Telekommunikationsutrustning ska underhallas med aktuella sakerhetsuppdateringar och firmwareuppdateringar.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta en process for patchhantering av natverksutrustning. Tilllampa sakerhetsuppdateringar i tid.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att sakerhetsuppdateringar tilllampas pa natverksutrustning.

controls.title: Third-party access control for network infrastructure
controls.description: Third-party access to telecom network infrastructure shall be controlled, monitored, and logged.
controls.description_nl: Tredjepartsatkomst till telekomnatverksinfrastruktur ska kontrolleras, overvakas och loggas.
controls.implementation_guidance: Begrantsa tredjepartsatkomst till natverksutrustning. Krav MFA och sessionsloggning. Kontrollera avtal.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att tredjepartsatkomst kontrolleras och loggas.

controls.title: Roaming security requirements
controls.description: Roaming interconnections shall implement security measures to protect against signaling attacks and fraud.
controls.description_nl: Roaming-samtrafikopplingar ska implementera sakerhetsatgarder for att skydda mot signaleringsattacker och bedrageri.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera sakerhetsatgarder for GTP-trafik. Filtrera otillaten signalering. Overvaka roaming-trafik for anomalier.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att roaming-sakerhetsatgarder ar implementerade.

controls.title: Number portability security
controls.description: Number portability processes shall include identity verification to prevent unauthorized number transfers.
controls.description_nl: Nummerporteringsprocesser ska inkludera identitetsverifiering for att forhindra obehorigade nummerflytt.
controls.implementation_guidance: Verifiera abonnentens identitet vid nummerportering. Implementera forsinkningsperiod for att mojliggora avbokning.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att identitetsverifiering sker vid nummerportering.

controls.title: DNS infrastructure resilience
controls.description: DNS infrastructure operated by communications providers shall be resilient with Anycast, redundancy, and DDoS protection.
controls.description_nl: DNS-infrastruktur som drivs av kommunikationslevrantorer ska vara motstandskraftig med Anycast, redundans och DDoS-skydd.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera Anycast for DNS-tjanster. Sakerstall geografisk redundans. Tilllampa DDoS-skydd for DNS-infrastrukturen.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att DNS-infrastrukturen ar redundant och skyddad.

controls.title: SIM swap fraud prevention
controls.description: SIM swap processes shall include strong identity verification to prevent account takeover attacks.
controls.description_nl: SIM-bytesprocesser ska inkludera stark identitetsverifiering for att forhindra kontoovertagninsangrepp.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera stark identitetsverifiering vid SIM-byte. Notifiera abonnenten om SIM-bytesbegaran. Tilllampa forsinkningsperiod.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att SIM-bytesskydd ar implementerat.

controls.title: 5G security requirements
controls.description: 5G network deployments shall implement security measures addressing new attack surfaces including network slicing and edge computing.
controls.description_nl: 5G-natverksdeplojeringar ska implementera sakerhetsatgarder som adresserar nya attackytor inklusive natverkssegmentering och edge computing.
controls.implementation_guidance: Tilllampa 3GPP-sakerhetsspecifikationer for 5G. Sakra natverksslicing. Implementera zero-trust for edge-nooder.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att 5G-sakerhetskrav ar implementerade.

controls.title: Interconnection security agreements
controls.description: Interconnection agreements between operators shall include cybersecurity requirements and incident notification obligations.
controls.description_nl: Samtrafikavtal mellan operatorer ska inkludera cybersakerhetskrav och skyldigheter for incidentnotifiering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Inkludera sakerhetskrav i samtrafikavtal. Definiera incidentnotifieringsrutiner mellan operatorer.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att samtrafikavtal innehaller sakerhetskrav.

controls.title: Telecom equipment supply chain assessment
controls.description: Telecom equipment from high-risk vendors shall be subject to enhanced security assessment per national security guidance.
controls.description_nl: Telekomutrustning fran hogrisklevrantorer ska vara foremal for forstaarkt sakerhetsbedomning enligt nationell sakerhetsvagledning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Bedome leverantorsrisker for all natverksutrustning. Folj MSB:s och PTS:s vagledning om hogrisklevrantorer.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att leveranskedjebedomning genomfors for telekomutrustning.
